lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਮੈ ਹਰਿ ਬਿਨੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: mere man mai har bin avar na koe |
lines.english: O my mind, there is no other than the Lord for me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਸੂਤਧਾਰੁ ਹੈ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਸੂਤੁ ਖਿੰਚੇ ਢਹਿ ਢੇਰੀ ਹੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aape hee sootadhaar hai piaaraa soot khinche dteh dteree hoe |1|
lines.english: He holds the thread, and when He withdraws the thread, the beads scatter into heaps. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਵਿਚਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਹੈ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਕਰਿ ਦਇਆ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਮੁਖਿ ਚੋਇ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: satigur vich naam nidhaan hai piaaraa kar deaa amrit mukh choe | rahaau |
lines.english: The treasure of the Beloved Naam is within the True Guru; in His Mercy, he pours the Ambrosial Nectar into my mouth. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਜਲ ਥਲਿ ਸਭਤੁ ਹੈ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਆਪੇ ਕਰੇ ਸੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: aape jal thal sabhat hai piaaraa prabh aape kare su hoe |
lines.english: The Beloved Himself is in all the oceans and lands; whatever God does, comes to pass.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਨਾ ਰਿਜਕੁ ਸਮਾਹਦਾ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਦੂਜਾ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabhanaa rijak samaahadaa piaaraa doojaa avar na koe |
lines.english: The Beloved brings nourishment to all; there is no other than Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਖੇਲ ਖੇਲਾਇਦਾ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਆਪੇ ਕਰੇ ਸੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aape khel khelaaeidaa piaaraa aape kare su hoe |2|
lines.english: The Beloved Himself plays, and whatever He Himself does, comes to pass. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਆਪਿ ਨਿਰਮਲਾ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਆਪੇ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: aape hee aap niramalaa piaaraa aape niramal soe |
lines.english: The Beloved Himself, all by Himself, is immaculate and pure; He Himself is immaculate and pure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਪਾਇਦਾ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਆਪੇ ਕਰੇ ਸੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: aape keemat paaeidaa piaaraa aape kare su hoe |
lines.english: The Beloved Himself determines the value of all; whatever He does comes to pass.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਅਲਖੁ ਨ ਲਖੀਐ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਆਪਿ ਲਖਾਵੈ ਸੋਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aape alakh na lakheeai piaaraa aap lakhaavai soe |3|
lines.english: The Beloved Himself is unseen - He cannot be seen; He Himself causes us to see. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਗਹਿਰ ਗੰਭੀਰੁ ਹੈ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਜੇਵਡੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: aape gahir ganbheer hai piaaraa tis jevadd avar na koe |
lines.english: The Beloved Himself is deep and profound and unfathomable; there is no other as great as He.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਿ ਘਟ ਆਪੇ ਭੋਗਵੈ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਵਿਚਿ ਨਾਰੀ ਪੁਰਖ ਸਭੁ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabh ghatt aape bhogavai piaaraa vich naaree purakh sabh soe |
lines.english: The Beloved Himself enjoys every heart; He is contained within every woman and man.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਪਤੁ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਰਗਟੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੪॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak gupat varatadaa piaaraa guramukh paragatt hoe |4|2|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Beloved is pervading everywhere, but He is hidden; through the Guru, He is revealed. ||4||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Sorat'h, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਸਭੁ ਆਪਿ ਹੈ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਆਪੇ ਥਾਪਿ ਉਥਾਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: aape hee sabh aap hai piaaraa aape thaap uthaapai |
lines.english: He Himself, the Beloved, is Himself all-in-all; He Himself establishes and disestablishes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਵੇਖਿ ਵਿਗਸਦਾ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਕਰਿ ਚੋਜ ਵੇਖੈ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਆਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: aape vekh vigasadaa piaaraa kar choj vekhai prabh aapai |
lines.english: The Beloved Himself beholds, and rejoices; God Himself works wonders, and beholds them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਵਣਿ ਤਿਣਿ ਸਭਤੁ ਹੈ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਆਪੇ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜਾਪੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aape van tin sabhat hai piaaraa aape guramukh jaapai |1|
lines.english: The Beloved Himself is contained in all the woods and meadows; as Gurmukh, He reveals Himself. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪਿ ਮਨ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਰਸਿ ਧ੍ਰਾਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: jap man har har naam ras dhraapai |
lines.english: Meditate, O mind, on the Lord, Har, Har; through the sublime essence of Lord's Name, you shall be satisfied.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਨਾਮੁ ਮਹਾ ਰਸੁ ਮੀਠਾ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਚਖਿ ਜਾਪੈ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: amrit naam mahaa ras meetthaa gurasabadee chakh jaapai | rahaau |
lines.english: The Ambrosial Nectar of the Naam, is the sweetest juice; through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, its taste is revealed. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਤੀਰਥੁ ਤੁਲਹੜਾ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਆਪਿ ਤਰੈ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਆਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: aape teerath tulaharraa piaaraa aap tarai prabh aapai |
lines.english: The Beloved is Himself the place of pilgrimage and the raft; God Himself ferries Himself across.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਜਾਲੁ ਵਤਾਇਦਾ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਸਭੁ ਜਗੁ ਮਛੁਲੀ ਹਰਿ ਆਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: aape jaal vataaeidaa piaaraa sabh jag machhulee har aapai |
lines.english: The Beloved Himself casts the net over all the world; the Lord Himself is the fish.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਅਭੁਲੁ ਨ ਭੁਲਈ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਦੂਜਾ ਜਾਪੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aap abhul na bhulee piaaraa avar na doojaa jaapai |2|
lines.english: The Beloved Himself is infallible; He makes no mistakes. There is no other like Him to be seen. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਜੋਗੀ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਹੈ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਤਪੁ ਤਾਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: aape jogee purakh hai piaaraa aape hee tap taapai |
lines.english: The Beloved Himself is the Yogi, the Primal Being; He Himself practices intense meditation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਸਿੰਙੀ ਨਾਦੁ ਹੈ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਧੁਨਿ ਆਪਿ ਵਜਾਏ ਆਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: aape singee naad hai piaaraa dhun aap vajaae aapai |
lines.english: The Beloved Himself is the Yogi's horn, and the sound current of the Naad; He Himself plays the tune.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਆਪਿ ਹੈ ਚੇਲਾ ਉਪਦੇਸੁ ਕਰੈ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਆਪੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aape satigur aap hai chelaa upades karai prabh aapai |3|
lines.english: He Himself is the True Guru, and He Himself is the disciple; God Himself imparts the Teachings. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਨਾਉ ਜਪਾਇਦਾ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਜਪੁ ਜਾਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: aape naau japaaeidaa piaaraa aape hee jap jaapai |
lines.english: The Beloved Himself inspires us to chant His Name, and He Himself practices meditation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਆਪਿ ਹੈ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਰਸੁ ਆਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: aape amrit aap hai piaaraa aape hee ras aapai |
lines.english: The Beloved Himself is the Ambrosial Nectar; He Himself is the juice of it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Sorat'h, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਕੰਡਾ ਆਪਿ ਤਰਾਜੀ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਆਪੇ ਤੋਲਿ ਤੋਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: aape kanddaa aap taraajee prabh aape tol tolaaeaa |
lines.english: God Himself is the balance scale, He Himself is the weigher, and He Himself weighs with the weights.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਸਲਾਹਦਾ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਰਸਿ ਧ੍ਰਾਪੈ ॥੪॥੩॥
lines.translit: aape aap salaahadaa piaaraa jan naanak har ras dhraapai |4|3|
lines.english: The Beloved Himself praises Himself; servant Nanak is satisfied, with the sublime essence of the Lord. ||4||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਧਰਤੀ ਸਾਜੀਅਨੁ ਪਿਆਰੈ ਪਿਛੈ ਟੰਕੁ ਚੜਾਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aape dharatee saajeean piaarai pichhai ttank charraaeaa |1|
lines.english: The Beloved Himself fashioned the world, and He Himself counter-balances it with a gram. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਸਾਹੁ ਆਪੇ ਵਣਜਾਰਾ ਆਪੇ ਵਣਜੁ ਕਰਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: aape saahu aape vanajaaraa aape vanaj karaaeaa |
lines.english: He Himself is the banker, He Himself is the trader, and He Himself makes the trades.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਹੈ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਗੁਰਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਮੀਠਾ ਲਾਇਆ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam nidhaan hai piaaraa gur poorai meetthaa laaeaa | rahaau |
lines.english: The Name of the Beloved Lord, Har, Har, is a treasure; the Perfect Guru has made it seem sweet to me. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਇ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: mere man har har dhiaae sukh paaeaa |
lines.english: My mind meditates on the Lord, Har, Har, and finds peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਧਰਤੀ ਆਪਿ ਜਲੁ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਆਪੇ ਕਰੇ ਕਰਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: aape dharatee aap jal piaaraa aape kare karaaeaa |
lines.english: The Beloved Himself is the earth, and He Himself is the water; He Himself acts, and causes others to act.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਭਉ ਪਾਇਦਾ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਬੰਨਿ ਬਕਰੀ ਸੀਹੁ ਹਢਾਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aape hee bhau paaeidaa piaaraa ban bakaree seehu hadtaaeaa |2|
lines.english: The Beloved Himself instills the Fear of God; He binds the tiger and the goat together. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਜਲੁ ਮਾਟੀ ਬੰਧਿ ਰਖਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: aape hukam varatadaa piaaraa jal maattee bandh rakhaaeaa |
lines.english: The Beloved Himself issues His Commands, and keeps the water and the land bound down.
